markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the technical process for GrowthX to publish content on Elementum's site.](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**CMS Solved:** Elementum will implement Keystatic, a lightweight CMS that provides a UI on top of their existing Markdown files, enabling GrowthX to publish directly.](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [**Contract Finalized:** The contract is approved pending three revisions: adding a "gross non-performance" termination clause, requiring written permission for logo use, and setting quarterly payments.](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [**Kickoff Scheduled:** The project kicks off Feb 9 with a strategy session (Andrew, Nader) and a separate product deep dive (Kyle Westwood).](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)

## Topics

### Content Publishing Workflow

  - [**Problem:** Elementum lacks a traditional CMS, using only Markdown files in a GitHub repo, which prevents direct publishing by GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [**Solution:** Elementum will implement **Keystatic**.](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
      - [**Why:** It provides a browser-based UI for editing Markdown files directly in the repo, preserving the current tech stack.](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
      - [**Mechanism:** Edits in Keystatic create commits in the GitHub repo, triggering the existing CI/CD pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [**Content Scope:**](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Initial 3–6 months:** Focus on blog posts for SEO (educational, comparisons, alternatives).](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Future:** Potential for `/guides` sections, use case pages, and custom components (CTAs, tables, TOCs).](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Goal:** Drive high-intent traffic and improve AI answer ranking.](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)

### Contract & Logistics

  - [**Contract Revisions:**](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
      - [**Termination:** Add a clause for "gross non-performance" (e.g., inability to deliver services).](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
          - [**Why:** The "termination for breach" clause is insufficient, as defining "breach" for an ongoing service is ambiguous.](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
      - [**Logo Use:** Require explicit written permission.](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
      - [**Payments:** Set to quarterly.](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [**Signers & Contacts:**](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
      - [**Signer:** David Blonski (CFO) → `david@elementum.com`](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
      - [**Billing:** Levi Brown → `l.brown@elementum.com`](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [**Kickoff Meeting (Feb 9):**](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
      - [**Strategy Session:** Andrew Bennett, Nader (CEO)](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
      - [**Product Deep Dive:** Kyle Westwood (best person for a demo)](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
      - [Revise contract with termination, logo, and payment updates.](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
      - [Send final contract to Andrew by EOD Jan 28.](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
      - [Send Andrew details for the dinner event.](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [**Andrew:**](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
      - [Sign contract upon receipt.](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [**Porter:**](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
      - [Implement and host Keystatic.](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
      - [Attend kickoff meetings on Feb 9.](https://fathom.video/share/se6Mw9Gzg1weRzK5_cMYZnfqFEy1tV9X?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
